hero.eyebrow: Serving Broward & Palm Beach County Since 1994
hero.headline: South Florida's Trusted Air Conditioning Experts
hero.subheadline: Family-owned. State-certified. Available around the clock for repair, installation, and maintenance on homes and businesses across South Florida.
hero.imageAlt: Jireh Cooler office reception area with the company logo on the accent wall

pathways.heading: Built for Your Home. Ready for Your Business.

residential.label: Residential HVAC
residential.description: Reliable comfort for your home, from same-day repairs to full system replacements.
residential.imageAlt: Jireh Cooler technician servicing an outdoor residential air conditioning unit

commercial.label: Commercial HVAC
commercial.description: Dependable climate control for offices, restaurants, and retail spaces that can't afford downtime.
commercial.imageAlt: Jireh Cooler technician adjusting a commercial building's thermostat

trust.heading: Three Decades of South Florida Comfort
trust.subheading: Jireh Cooler has been a family-operated fixture in Broward and Palm Beach County since 1994.
trust.imageAlt: Jireh Cooler branded service vans and truck parked outside the company facility

points.label: Founded in 1994
points.description: Three decades of hands-on HVAC experience in South Florida's climate.

points.label: Family-Operated
points.description: Owner-led business built on direct accountability, not a call center.

points.label: 24/7 Emergency Availability
points.description: On call for urgent breakdowns, day or night.

services.heading: Complete Air Conditioning Services
services.subheading: From emergency repairs to full installations, we handle every part of your comfort system.

emergency.heading: AC Down? We're Already On Our Way.
emergency.description: South Florida heat doesn't wait for business hours, and neither do we. Our emergency line is staffed 24 hours a day, 7 days a week, 365 days a year.
emergency.imageAlt: HVAC technician using pressure gauges during an urgent air conditioning repair

whyChooseUs.heading: Why South Florida Chooses Jireh Cooler

points.label: Direct Owner Involvement
points.description: Founded and still run by Moyses Oliveira, with decades of hands-on technical experience behind every job.

points.label: Straightforward Pricing
points.description: Written estimates before work begins, with no pressure and no surprises.

points.label: Certified Technicians
points.description: Trained on the major brands we install and service, including Carrier, Bryant, Rheem, Goodman, and Lennox.

points.label: Built for the Long Term
points.description: Three decades of repeat customers across Broward and Palm Beach County.

steps.label: You Call or Request an Estimate
steps.description: Reach our team by phone or through our online request form, 24 hours a day.

steps.label: We Diagnose the Problem
steps.description: A certified technician evaluates your system and explains what's going on in plain language.

steps.label: You Get a Clear Estimate
steps.description: We provide written pricing before any work begins. No surprises on the invoice.

steps.label: We Get It Done Right
steps.description: Our technicians complete the repair, installation, or maintenance to code and to spec.

membership.heading: V.I.P. Maintenance Membership
membership.description: Our maintenance membership covers a comprehensive multi-point inspection twice a year, helping catch small issues before they become expensive breakdowns.
membership.imageAlt: Technician performing hands-on maintenance work on an outdoor air conditioning unit

financing.heading: Flexible Financing Options
financing.description: Financing is available for qualified homeowners so a system replacement doesn't have to be an all-at-once expense.
financing.imageAlt: Sunset view of a South Florida suburban neighborhood with palm trees

airQuality.heading: Breathe Easier Indoors
airQuality.description: UV light systems, duct cleaning, and filtration upgrades that improve the air quality inside your home or business.
airQuality.imageAlt: Bright, clean modern living space representing improved indoor air quality

finalCta.heading: Ready for Reliable Comfort?
finalCta.description: Talk to a real technician, not a call center. Reach out today for a straightforward estimate or emergency service.
finalCta.backgroundImageAlt: Rooftop commercial HVAC units against a clear sky
